candidates.title: Real Estate Corporate Video Editor
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have raw footage for a corporate-style real-estate video and I need a skilled editor to turn it into a polished final piece. The goals are clear: keep the tone professional, showcase the property, and reflect our brand’s clean, modern aesthetic. You’ll receive drives of interior and exterior walkthroughs, short agent interview bites, drone shots of the neighbourhood, plus our logo sting and music beds. Your job is to: • Select the best takes, trim any dead time, and craft a tight 2–3-minute narrative. • Apply colour correction and basic grading so whites are true and interiors feel bright. • Balance and clean the dialogue, lay in the music, and mix to broadcast-safe levels. • Add lower thirds for the agent’s name and simple motion graphics for key selling points. • Deliver in 1080p H.264 (main deliverable) I handle scripting, voice-over, and any re-shoots; you focus purely on the edit.

candidates.title: Customer-Focused Promo Video Edit
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have existing footage and brand assets that need to be shaped into a polished promotional video aimed squarely at our customers. The edit should feel energetic yet trustworthy, reflecting our brand personality from the very first frame. Here’s what I need you to handle from start to finish: select the strongest takes, craft a tight storyline, colour-grade for a consistent look, add on-brand motion graphics or lower thirds, mix the audio so dialogue and music sit perfectly together, and deliver a final master in 1080p and 4K. You can work in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve—whichever lets you move fastest without compromising quality. After Effects accents for logo animations are welcome if they elevate the piece. I’ll supply the raw clips, our logo pack, the brand colour codes, a preferred music track, and the key message we want viewers to remember. You return: • One

candidates.title: Daily Tamil Vlog Editor
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I publish a Tamil-language vlog every day and need a reliable editor who can take my raw footage and return a finished YouTube-ready file within 24 hours. The style I’m after is simple and clean with minimal effects—think tight trims, smooth audio leveling, subtle color correction, and light lower-thirds when context helps. No flashy transitions or rapid-fire cuts; clarity and coherence are the priorities. Each video must be delivered in standard 16:9 format (H.264 .mp4, 1080p). I’ll pass you the clips, reference notes, and any music beds via Google Drive; you send back the final render plus the editable project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve are all fine). Because the content is entirely in Tamil, understanding the language is essential for selecting the best takes and trimming dead air. The arrangement is straightforward: one completed vlog per day, payment on a per-

candidates.title: Davinci Resolve Editor
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price produce high-quality short-form content between 30 and 60 seconds, with most edits landing around 45 seconds. Content focuses on businesses, events, and venues, with distribution across Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube. This role requires strong editorial judgment, technical execution, and the ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality. The emphasis is on clean storytelling, pacing, and visual coherence rather than overuse of effects. Responsibilities: * Access and manage projects via Blackmagic Cloud * Download and select royalty-free music from sources like Pixabay, ensuring strong alignment with tone and edit rhythm * Review raw footage and remove unusable content * Select clips that contribute to narrative progression and visual variety * Structure sequences with clear flow and intentional pacing * Sync edits to music with attention to timing and energy
